'''dhangala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcft|mcft]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcft|mcft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhangala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhængælæth|dhængælæth]] || [[word:dhængælæj|dhængælæj]] || [[word:dhængælæsh|dhængælæsh]] || [[word:dhængælæ|dhængælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangangalath|dhangangalath]] || [[word:dhangangalaj|dhangangalaj]] || [[word:dhangangalash|dhangangalash]] || [[word:dhangangala|dhangangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhangalath|dhangalath]] || [[word:dhangalaj|dhangalaj]] || [[word:dhangalash|dhangalash]] || [[word:dhangala|dhangala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangaflath|dhangaflath]] || [[word:dhangaflaj|dhangaflaj]] || [[word:dhangaflash|dhangaflash]] || [[word:dhangaflaf|dhangaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhangalatha|dhangalatha]] || [[word:dhangalaja|dhangalaja]] || [[word:dhangalasha|dhangalasha]] || [[word:dhangalaka|dhangalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhangalath|dhangalath]] || [[word:dhangalaj|dhangalaj]] || [[word:dhangalash|dhangalash]] || [[word:dhangala|dhangala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhangalathal|dhangalathal]] || [[word:dhangalajal|dhangalajal]] || [[word:dhangalashal|dhangalashal]] || [[word:dhangalakal|dhangalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhangalathatha|dhangalathatha]] || [[word:dhangalajaja|dhangalajaja]] || [[word:dhangalashasha|dhangalashasha]] || [[word:dhangalaka|dhangalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhangalathan|dhangalathan]] || [[word:dhangalajan|dhangalajan]] || [[word:dhangalashan|dhangalashan]] || [[word:dhangalakan|dhangalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhangalathaoro|dhangalathaoro]] || [[word:dhangalajaoro|dhangalajaoro]] || [[word:dhangalashaoro|dhangalashaoro]] || [[word:dhangalakaoro|dhangalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
